source_gap.label: contingencia de linguagem por rotacao cloud
source_gap.next_experiment: validar que o nucleo estruturado decide primeiro e que cloud rotation atua apenas como verbalizador/fallback quando a investigacao ativa precisar de linguagem

principle: structured reasoning is the source of decisions; cloud providers are language/interface capacity only

acceptance_criteria.routing: structured modules or active investigation run before any cloud verbalizer
acceptance_criteria.fallback: cloud rotation is used only after evidence coverage is measured insufficient
acceptance_criteria.traceability: response trace includes module, investigation id or evidence source

experiments.probe: ask an under-covered question and verify non_llm_active_investigation before LLM fallback
verify provider rotation remains available for language formatting when explicitly needed
UltronPro Intelligence Test Suite remains >= 7.5 and >= 11/13

next_action: executar probe de investigacao ativa e confirmar que a cloud nao virou arbitro cognitivo
